steps.title: Identify the shared subject matter
steps.content: Text 1 states “scientists still have a lot to learn” about sloths and explains why—their tree-dwelling habitat makes them inaccessible. Text 2 presents a monitoring device that finally allows scientists to uncover previously hidden information. Both texts directly address the challenge scientists face in learning about sloths.

steps.title: Find the answer that captures this shared focus
steps.content: Choice B—”Scientists' efforts to understand sloths”—encompasses what both texts address: Text 1 shows the barrier to understanding, and Text 2 demonstrates a solution. The other options either isolate single-text details or address topics the authors don't emphasize. That matches choice B — B is correct.
